# PHP Dependency Injection Benchmark

This repository benchmarks different dependency injection containers.

## Summary

| Container | Average | Minimum | Maximum |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| laravel | 0.53745446205139 | 0.53645610809326 | 0.53834199905396 |
| nette-di | 0.0034407615661621 | 0.0033979415893555 | 0.003493070602417 |
| php-di | 0.00089597702026367 | 0.00087499618530273 | 0.00095105171203613 |
| pimple | 0.06994423866272 | 0.069525003433228 | 0.070163011550903 |
| quickly-configured | 0.0038089275360107 | 0.0037369728088379 | 0.0038831233978271 |
| quickly-reflection | 0.0039896965026855 | 0.0037670135498047 | 0.0047998428344727 |
| symfony | 0.002692985534668 | 0.0026350021362305 | 0.002830982208252 |

## Test Results

Results from the latest automated run of the Dockerized benchmarks
(triggered on pushes to main and a monthly schedule):

run 0: 0.53666400909424 seconds per 10000
